item.title: 纽约是第一个暂停人工智能数据中心建设的州
item.summary: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an executive order on Tuesday to pause the issuance of new building permits for hyperscale data centers in the state, the first state-level freeze on new construction of AI data centers. The moratorium could last up to one year with the expectation that the state will use that time to
